name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Grand Prairie, TX's Cash America Pawn at 310 E Main St offers quick pawn loans and merchandise purchases.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn operates at 310 E Main St in Grand Prairie, TX, serving the local community from a standalone storefront. The location features typical pawn shop operations with merchandise displays and service counters. Hours of operation: Monday–Friday 9:30 AM–6:30 PM, Saturday 9:30 AM–6 PM, and Sunday 11 AM–4 PM.

This Grand Prairie location provides pawn loans against personal belongings, purchases of merchandise at competitive prices, and quick cash solutions for residents. You can contact the store at +1 972-264-0386 to discuss your items, get valuations, or arrange a transaction.

For Grand Prairie residents in need of quick cash or looking to buy quality secondhand merchandise, this pawn shop is accessible on E Main St. Bring a valid ID and the items you wish to pawn or sell. Cash America Pawn keeps it straightforward: fair evaluations and same-day payouts.
address: 310 E Main St, Grand Prairie, TX 75050

company_info.headquarters: 310 E Main St, Grand Prairie, TX 75050

pros: Large network of 3,300+ locations provides convenient access across multiple states and countries
Non-recourse loans mean no legal obligation to repay beyond forfeiting the pledged collateral
Fast approval and same-day cash without credit checks or income verification requirements
No credit history requirements—accessible to those with poor credit or no credit history
Publicly traded company with S&P index inclusion ensures regulatory compliance and financial stability
Diverse merchandise buying option allows borrowing against jewelry, electronics, tools, and other valuables
Layaway service provides affordable purchasing with 10% down payment option
cons: Pawn loans are high-cost borrowing—interest rates and terms vary by state but typically exceed conventional loan rates
Loss of collateral risk: failure to repay results in permanent loss of pledged personal property with no recourse
Limited loan amounts tied to collateral value, making large loans difficult unless items have significant worth
Retail merchandise quality and selection varies by location; inventory is constantly changing
Pawn loans are short-term solutions, typically 30-90 days, creating renewal/rollover debt cycles for some borrowers
best_for: Individuals with immediate cash needs and valuable collateral who cannot access traditional credit
Consumers seeking quick loans without credit checks or income verification requirements
People looking to sell jewelry, gold, electronics, or other merchandise for immediate cash
Borrowers wanting an alternative to payday loans or title loans with non-recourse terms
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals with valuable personal property who need immediate cash and lack access to traditional credit or cannot qualify for conventional loans. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term borrowing vehicles that result in permanent loss of pledged items if unpaid, making them suitable only when no other financing alternatives exist and the borrower can afford the interest and terms.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying for cash
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations
Store locator and merchandise inventory search
Wide-variety merchandise buying (buys almost anything of value)
Non-recourse pawn lending (no legal obligation to repay beyond forfeiting collateral)
